basis: Local seed identifies a BG legendary creature from Secrets of Strixhaven Commander.
Scryfall card context verifies death-trigger and counter oracle text.
EDHREC Commander context and secondary-commander commentary exist; cEDH relevance is not proven.

source_limit_notes: Persist and sacrifice packages are role signals, not copied public decklists.
Combo lines are useful to know but should remain bracket-aware.

themes.name: golgari_aristocrats_counters
themes.notes: Gorma grows when creatures die and rewards turns where nontoken creatures enter after deaths.

themes.name: sacrifice_outlets_and_death_payoffs
themes.notes: Free or repeatable sacrifice outlets convert expendable bodies into counters, drain, and cards.

themes.name: persist_undying_counter_reset
themes.notes: Persist/undying creatures and +1/+1 counter infrastructure create resilient value and possible combos.

themes.name: token_fodder_and_recursion
themes.notes: Tokens and recursive small creatures fuel death counts without overcommitting real cards.

examples: generic +1/+1 counters deck with no sacrifice density
avoid_patterns.reason: The commander needs creatures dying to unlock its strongest text.
Common persist cards with white identity are off-color for BG.

examples: all-in persist combo shell as mandatory output
avoid_patterns.reason: Combo potential is real but cEDH relevance is not proven.
